prompt:
Tea & Rain Mood ☕

Create an ultra realistic cinematic portrait of a thoughtful young man sitting beside a large rain covered window during a peaceful evening. He is holding a steaming cup of traditional tea with both hands, gazing outside at the rain soaked streets illuminated by warm streetlights and distant city lights. Soft golden reflections shimmer across the wet glass while raindrops create dreamy bokeh patterns.

The man has neatly styled dark hair, natural facial features, warm brown eyes, and a calm introspective expression. He wears a fitted black sweater layered under a dark charcoal coat, creating a refined yet cozy aesthetic. Subtle beard stubble, realistic skin texture, visible pores, and natural lighting enhance the authenticity.

The atmosphere feels quiet, reflective, and emotionally rich. Steam rises gently from the tea cup, illuminated by soft ambient lighting. The background shows blurred city lights, rain streaks, and a moody blue hour skyline. Cinematic storytelling, luxury lifestyle photography, emotional depth, shallow depth of field, soft contrast, realistic reflections, warm and cool color balance, premium editorial quality, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, ultra detailed, masterpiece, 8K.

Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry face, extra fingers, distorted hands, cartoon, anime, CGI, overexposed lighting, unrealistic skin, duplicate person, watermark, text, logo, poor composition, low resolution.
